content:
import os, re
for f in sorted(os.listdir('logs')):
    p = os.path.join('logs', f)
    with open(p) as fh:
        content = fh.read()
    # Extract eval lines
    evals = re.findall(r'step=(\d+) eval_reward=([-\d.]+) best=([-\d.]+)', content)
    print(f'=== {f} ({len(evals)} evals) ===')
    if evals:
        # show first, peak, last
        rewards = [float(e[1]) for e in evals]
        peak_idx = rewards.index(max(rewards))
        print(f'  first: step={evals[0][0]} r={evals[0][1]}')
        print(f'  peak:  step={evals[peak_idx][0]} r={evals[peak_idx][1]}')
        print(f'  last:  step={evals[-1][0]} r={evals[-1][1]} best={evals[-1][2]}')
    # also tail
    print('  tail:', content[-200:].replace('\n',' | '))
    print()
